issues.title: Enemy dealt 4 damage (57% of 7 HP) on floor 2
issues.description: At turn seq 182, floor 2 encounter 0, enemy dealt 4 damage when player had 7 HP. This is 57% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 4 damage (57% of player's 7 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 2
issues.description: beginner profile was defeated on floor 2 with 47.69230769230769% accuracy. Final encounter against toxic_spore (common), dealt 8 but took 17 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing early floor difficulty or adding more healing opportunities
